valid.name: column-not-null
valid.code:
-- NOT NULL on a column is allowed without an explicit name.
CREATE TABLE items (id int PRIMARY KEY, code text NOT NULL);

valid.name: named-add-fk
named-unique

errors.message: Table-level CHECK / UNIQUE / FOREIGN KEY / EXCLUSION constraints should be named with `CONSTRAINT <name>`. Auto-generated names are unpredictable across environments and make later `DROP CONSTRAINT` / `ALTER CONSTRAINT` migrations brittle.

invalid.name: create-table-unique
invalid.code: CREATE TABLE items (id int, code text, UNIQUE (code));

errors.message: Table-level CHECK / UNIQUE / FOREIGN KEY / EXCLUSION constraints should be named with `CONSTRAINT <name>`. Auto-generated names are unpredictable across environments and make later `DROP CONSTRAINT` / `ALTER CONSTRAINT` migrations brittle.
